headline: Why Rollins (ROL) Shares Are Sliding Today
summary: Shares of pest control company Rollins (NYSE:ROL) fell 9.5% in the afternoon session after the company reported weak second-quarter financial results that missed Wall Street's expectations. Rollins posted non-GAAP earnings of $0.32 per share, falling short of the $0.34 expected by analysts. Revenue came in at $1.08 billion, missing the $1.09 billion consensus estimate. Adjusted EBITDA also missed expectations, arriving at $236.3 million versus the anticipated $255.5 million. While top-line reven
